name: Dre Alexandra
voice: Warm, human, grounded. A doctor who speaks like a friend — accessible without dumbing down. French-language content. Demystifies complex medical topics.
tone: Reassuring and educational. Empathetic. Reduces anxiety around health topics. Conversational but credible.
format_notes: Content is primarily in French. Titles and descriptions should be in French. Short-form health capsules covering symptoms, illnesses, and treatments. Audience: French-speaking Quebecers anxious about health topics.
title_style: Clear, benefit-driven, slightly reassuring. e.g. 'Pourquoi tu as toujours froid — ce que ton corps essaie de te dire'. Avoid sensationalism.
thumbnail_style: Direct statement or gentle question. Short. In French. e.g. 'C'est normal?' or 'Voici pourquoi'
description_example: Dans cette capsule, je t'explique [SUJET] de façon simple et humaine. Tu vas comprendre ce qui se passe dans ton corps et savoir comment réagir. Abonne-toi pour apaiser ton anxiété face à ta santé ~
